requirement: The vehicle concept shall remain within a low-speed urban operating envelope not exceeding 50 km/h.
The selected vehicle concept shall provide an estimated range of at least 40 km under simplified urban operating assumptions.
The selected vehicle concept shall be chosen using a documented weighted decision matrix.
The emergency brake-request logic shall calculate stopping distance using ego speed, road friction, and actuator-delay assumptions.
The emergency brake-request logic shall calculate TTC using target distance and relative speed.
The warning logic shall classify risk into SAFE, CAUTION, WARNING, and EMERGENCY_BRAKE according to defined thresholds.
The logic shall generate brake_request = 1 only when the warning state is EMERGENCY_BRAKE.
The verification shall show the effect of actuator delay on stopping distance and risk classification.
The actuator concept shall be selected using documented weighted criteria.
Each major requirement shall be traceable to functions, logical blocks, physical elements, and verification scenarios.
